ageofflax:itemdesc-flaxbundle-rippled: Soak in a barrel with water to loosen fibers
ageofflax:blockdesc-ripple-*: A tool used for extracting seeds from flax
ageofflax:blockdesc-break-*: A tool used for breaking dried flax
ageofflax:blockdesc-hatchel-*: A tool used for extracting flax fibers from broken flax
ageofflax:blockdesc-dryingrack-*: Will dry retted flax about 2x faster.
ageofflax:item-handbooktext-flaxbundle-u: Step 1 of 5: Extact seeds from the flax by holding rightmouse on a ripple.
ageofflax:item-handbooktext-flaxbundle-r: Step 2 of 5: Ret the rippled flax by soaking it in a barrel with water.
Step 3 of 5: Let the retted flax dry. You can rightmouse on a drying rack to let the retted flax dry 2x faster.
ageofflax:item-handbooktext-flaxbundle-d: Step 4 of 5: Break the dried flax by holding rightmouse on a break.
ageofflax:item-handbooktext-flaxbundle-b: Step 5 of 5: Extact flax fibers from the broken flax by holding rightmouse on a hatchel.
ageofflax:craftinginfo-flax-title: Crafting Mechanic: Extracting Fibers From Flax
ageofflax:craftinginfo-flax-text:
Preparation
Extracting fibers from flax is a multi-step process, that will require at least one barrel, but having several will make the process better for larger yields.

Steps
Step 1 - After harvesting the flax you can extract the seeds and grain from the flax bundle by holding rightmouse on a ripple.
Step 2 - Now ret the rippled flax by sealing it in a barrel with water for 24 hours.
Step 3 - Remove the now retted flax and let it airdry for 2 days. You can rightmouse on a drying rack to let the retted flax dry 2x faster.
Step 4 - The dried flax can now be easily broken by holding it with rightmouse on a break.
Step 5 - Now to actually get the fibers from the broken flax you need to hold rightmouse on a hatchel.

Upgrades
Now the primitive versions of the ripple, hatchel and break do serve their purpose well, but using more advanced versions of these tools will result in a better extraction
game:item-handbooktext-flaxfibers: Read the Flax Fiber Extraction Guide for a detailed step-by-step explanation on how to extract fibers from flax.
